titleStmt.title: SII 38.493: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 493. (A.R. No. 493 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the south wall, first prākāra, Siddharatnēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachchakkaravattigaḷ Rājarāja III Year: 16+1, Kaṉṉi, śu. di. 5, 1233 A.D.

summary.p: Built in. It records that Brahmādharāya Muttaraiyan sold his land of 1(1/2) vēli, 3 mā and 1 kāṇi in extent to his subordinate Śrutimāṉ Śōṟaṉ Koṇḍāṉ alias Laṅkūśvara dēva ••••••, who owned kāṇi at Neṟkuḷam.
Śōṟaṉ Muttaraiyaṉ and several others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī Irājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6 vatintiRead vatiṉEtirāmāṇṭu kaṉṉināya(ya)ṟṟu pūṟuva pakṣattu pañcami
piramātarāya muttaraiyeṉeṉ Eṉṉaṭiyāril neṟkuḷam kāṇi Uṭaiya curitimāṉcoṟaṉkoṇṭaṉāṉa Ilaṅkecura teva tu n
ceynilattu cuṉimār kāṇiyum Eṉṉaṭiyār kāṇiyum nikki Eṉ kāṇiyāy viṟkiṉṟa nilattukku Ellaiyāva
pāṟkellai neṟkuḷattu puṉceykku kiḻakkum teṟku nokki poṉa vāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ikkuḷattuk
mum nikki Eṉ kāṇiyāy pala taṭiyālum palataḷaiyālum patiṉāla yum pilakkaṭiyumāṉa kolāl mikutikkuṟaivukaḷ 2� » 1 kkun
m teṉpāṟkellai putukuḷattu nirkovaluThe two letter valu is found engraved above.kku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Ikkuḷattu nir kovalukkukiḻakkum vaṭapāṟke
māṉa kolāl (1/2) m Āka na nilam Oṉṟaraiye muṉṟu mā kāṇiyum puṉcey nilam
ṟṟikaic celavaṟakoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇaicaivutiṭṭu kuṭutteṉ Iṉta naṉcey ni
m meṉokkiṉamaramum kiḻnokkiyakiṇaṟum maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭa pirāttikaḷum 2� Ita
ṉai ciyaṉāna piramāta�This letter may be read as ra �ya muttaraiyaṉeṉ Innilattukku Ituve poruḷ ma
vatum mukkālāvatum viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu kuṭutteṉ coṟaṉ �
Iṉciyaṉāna piramātarāyamuttaraiyeṉaṉ Innilattukku Ituve poruḷ mā
vatum mukkālāvatum viṟṟu vilaipiramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu kuṭutteṉ coṟaṉ I
muttaraiyaṉeṉ ṉeḻuttu Itu ciyaṉmallaṉāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻa mira
cayiñāṉamaik tiruppālaittuṟai Uṭaiyār koyilkaṇakku celūru�
kuṟiyāmaṅkalamuṭaiya tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉāṉa Ūṟaiyāṇṭāṉ nā
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ viṭaimār tūmāmaṇiṉāyaṉārkoyilil caivvācāriyam teva
ttu I maṇayaṉ kampanāṭāḻvāṉ cayiñāṉataṉmaikku caṅkentiti
tiyātamārāya cayiñāṉatamaikku Ivai piramātaraāyaācāriya neḻuttu Itu §
ci Uṭaiyāṉ taṭuttāḷkoṇṭān Aṟaṅkāttā(ṉa)ṉeḻuttu Itu
pat cuttaṉ vempaṉāna Irākāvācāriyaneḻuttu Itu
ttu Itu Ariyāṉ ciṉṉacittirakūṭa muttaraiyaṉ cayiñāṉanamaikku neṟkuḷam kāṇi Uḷa
mma nāyanvaṭukaṉ pirammātarāyaācāriyaneḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.493 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
